hero.title: Surveying and Civil 3D tools without the bloat.
hero.body: Suite installers for legacy AutoCAD / Land Desktop workflows and modern Civil 3D setups. Built around field-to-CAD production, point import, DXF output, adjustment tools, and deployment packages.

suites.name: GB Tools Suite 2000
suites.subtitle: AutoCAD / Land Desktop 2000
suites.description: Installer package for old-school production machines that need reliable LISP/VBA utilities and DXF-based workflows.

suites.name: GB Tools Suite 2027
suites.subtitle: Civil 3D / AutoCAD 2027
suites.description: Installer package for modern Civil 3D workflows using .NET tools, LISP helpers, and bundle-style deployment.

standalonePanel.title: Standalone downloads
standalonePanel.description: Individual installers and scripts stay on the standalone catalog for now. This site becomes the clean front page for suite installers and major releases.

rows.name: Any2DXF
rows.description: Point import and DXF export for legacy and modern CAD workflows.

rows.name: LS Adjust
rows.description: Move and rotate selected CAD objects to match control points.

rows.name: C3D Tools
rows.description: Civil 3D 2027 utilities, bundle loading, and command helpers.

rows.name: LISP Pack
rows.description: Startup scripts, menu targets, toolbar commands, and CAD helpers.

adminSection.title: Admin editor
adminSection.caption: browser save plus JSON export
adminSection.note: Use the URL-code editor to change site text, suite panels, tool rows, and GitHub Release links. Save browser preview for quick testing, then download or copy data/site.json when you want to commit the public version.
